required.name: from_date
required.description: Inclusive lower bound applied to DATE(recipes.start_time).

required.name: to_date
required.description: Inclusive upper bound applied to DATE(recipes.start_time).

optional.name: recipe_code
optional.description: Optional equality filter for recipes.recipe_name (leave blank for all).

datasets.description: One record per batch/run. Uses bin1..bin12 data to render an HTML <tbody> with child material rows and batch-level totals.

columns.from: ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY recipes.recipe_name ORDER BY recipes.start_time, recipes.id)

'' || GROUP_CONCAT('' || '' || material_sl_no || '' || '' || REPLACE(REPLACE(COALESCE(material_name, ''), '&', '&'), '<', '<') || '' || '' || printf('%g', COALESCE(set_wt, 0)) || '' || '' || printf('%g', COALESCE(ach_wt, 0)) || '' || '' || printf('%g', COALESCE(ach_wt - set_wt, 0)) || '' || '' || COALESCE(printf('%g', CASE WHEN set_wt IS NULL OR set_wt = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 100.0 * (ach_wt - set_wt) / set_wt END), '') || '' || '', '') || ''
CASE WHEN SUM(materials.set_wt) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 100.0 * SUM(materials.ach_wt - materials.set_wt) / SUM(materials.set_wt) END

filters: Apply recipe_name = :recipe_code when recipe_code is provided

datasets.description: Aggregates every filtered bin entry to compute overall set/achieved/error totals for the page summary.

columns.from: CASE WHEN SUM(materials.set_wt) = 0 THEN NULL ELSE 100.0 * SUM(materials.ach_wt - materials.set_wt) / SUM(materials.set_wt) END

filters: Reuse the same filtered population used for rows

reshape_rules.purpose: Unpivot bin1..bin12 into long-form rows (batch_id, bin_no, material_name, set_wt, ach_wt) before aggregation.
